# FrameForge

> FrameForge is the AI performance command center for gamers and streamers. It optimizes Windows gaming PCs with AI-driven advice, detects hardware and computes a health score, applies real reversible OS tweaks, tracks live telemetry (FPS, CPU/GPU temps, input lag, network bufferbloat) and monitors component prices across stores like Amazon.

## Core features

- [AI Advisor](https://forgefps.dev/): Context-aware AI that knows your hardware and health score and recommends optimizations and upgrades.
- [Live Telemetry](https://forgefps.dev/): Real-time FPS, CPU/GPU temperatures, input lag and network latency monitoring.
- [PC Optimization](https://forgefps.dev/): Downloadable Windows agent (PowerShell) that applies real, 100% reversible tweaks.
- [Build Generator](https://forgefps.dev/): Tailored streamer/gaming PC build recommendations by budget.
- [Price Tracker](https://forgefps.dev/): Track component prices across stores with drop alerts.

## Access

- [Sign in](https://forgefps.dev/login): Existing user login.
- [Create account](https://forgefps.dev/register): Free registration, active in under a minute.
